case_title: S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. VS. LEONARDO MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, LEONARDO $787.73 PRINCIPAL, $115.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $903.67, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CORRESPONDENCE RETURNED - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT -
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM.: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.94) SERVED AUG-01-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, LEONARDO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $787.73 FILED BY S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, LEONARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-03-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF S.F. AUTOMOTIVE PARTS WAREHOUSE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2011 - JUDGMENT.
